title: [ CRYSTAL BALL OF FATE ]
subtitle: "Ask the Machine Spirit a question, and the ball shall reveal the truth"

wisdom.title: [ WISDOM OF THE CRYSTAL BALL ]
wisdom.warning: But remember: even the Machine Spirit can be wrong,
wisdom.advice: Use the wisdom of the ball, but trust your code more."
wisdom.footer: — Omnissiah, Machine Spirit, Keeper of Fates
